title: allionia oxybaphodes
intro: Allionia oxybaphodes, also known as Allionia, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the family Nyctaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Allionia oxybaphodes include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antihemorrhagic agent. Allionia oxybaphodes is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes.
